gene_region.label: LEP transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical LEP genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: LEP encodes leptin, an adipocyte-derived endocrine hormone. This bundle emphasizes adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local LEP bundle is leptin endocrine signaling oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: LEP variants can alter or tag adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: LEP methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for LEP.
Because LEP biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use LEP promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000174697: LEP coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: LEP biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: LEP: adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a LEP leptin endocrine signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk and Energy balance and obesity context, Leptin deficiency review context. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs7799039 (LEP promoter marker) is curated as a LEP marker for Energy balance and obesity context, Leptin deficiency review context. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag adipose endocrine signaling, hypothalamic appetite regulation, energy expenditure, puberty/fertility signaling, and inflammatory crosstalk.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a LEP pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs7799039 (LEP promoter marker) with LEP methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
